positive: Minimalist line art style, geometric illustration of a stylized forest scene, featuring abstract woodland creatures (fox, owl, deer) integrated with stylized botanical elements (ferns, moss, abstract branches). The composition is centrally balanced, creating a strong silhouette effect with thick black lines on a pure white background. Use complementary earthy tones (deep forest green, burnt orange, sepia brown) for secondary color accents within the lines. High contrast, crisp linework, suitable for screen printing on apparel. View from an aerial, overhead perspective to maximize pattern symmetry and balance. Clean, vector quality, highly detailed.
